productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and nubuck upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with a perforated nubuck panel on the forefoot extending to the tongue, and has a nubuck toe guard for absolute breathable comfortPerforated nubuck panels on the sides of the mouth for enhanced breathabilityCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs throughout the and has ridges at the upper midfoot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the nubuck patches using a nubuck brush To clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
